word: G3765 - οὐκέτι - oukéti - ook-et'-ee - After that

sections.paragraph:
- Original: οὐκέτι

- Transliteration: Ouketi

- Phonetic: ook-et'-ee

- Definition:

1. no longer, no more, no further

- Origin: from G3756 and G2089

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Also (separately) οὐκἔτι ouk eti ook et'-ee From G3756 and G2089; not yet no longer: - after that (not) (not) any more henceforth (hereafter) not no longer (more) not as yet (now) now no more (not) yet (not).
